ast.name: textContent
ast.source: At least one option above must be enabled. If you enable the playground link, you must also enable the JSON file.
ast.target: 上述选项中至少必须启用一项。如果您启用了 playground 链接，则必须同时启用 JSON 文件。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Updating these settings will reset the playground editor and clipboard history.
ast.target: 更新这些设置将重置 playground 编辑器和剪贴板历史记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include link to open playground in Livecodes
ast.target: 包含在 Livecodes 中打开 playground 的链接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 包含 HTML 结果文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 包含 JSON 模板文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include markdown file with frontmatter and fenced codeblocks
ast.target: 包含带有 frontmatter 和代码块的 Markdown 文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL for serving livecodes static codebase
ast.target: 用于提供 livecodes 静态代码库的 URL

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder for saving playground JSON files
ast.target: 用于保存 playground JSON 文件的知识库文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to watch for playground changes and save JSON file
ast.target: 启用以监视 playground 变化并保存 JSON 文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder for saving playground notes
ast.target: 用于保存 playground 笔记的知识库文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable short URL service for sharing a playground URL. Click the help icon for privacy implications.
ast.target: 启用短 URL 服务以分享 playground URL。点击帮助图标了解隐私影响。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For creating Github gists. Click the help icon for further details.
ast.target: 用于创建 Github gists。点击帮助图标了解更多详情。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gists are secret by default. Enable this setting to create public gists.
ast.target: Gists 默认为私密。启用此设置以创建公开 gists。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: CSS height for livecodes playground. e.g. 600 or 100% (default: 600)
ast.target: livecodes playground 的 CSS 高度。例如 600 或 100%（默认：600）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the playground layout to horizontal or vertical. If set to "responsive", the layout is vertical in small screens when the playground height is larger than its width, otherwise horizontal. (default: responsive)
ast.target: 将 playground 布局设置为水平或垂直。如果设置为“响应式”，则在 playground 高度大于宽度的小屏幕上布局为垂直，否则为水平。（默认：响应式）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable word wrapping in editor pane
ast.target: 在编辑器窗格中启用自动换行

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable line numbers in editor pane
ast.target: 在编辑器窗格中启用行号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 使用制表符而不是空格

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use auto-complete to close brackets and quotes
ast.target: 使用自动补全来关闭括号和引号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable auto updates of results pane after editor code changes
ast.target: 在编辑器代码更改后启用结果窗格的自动更新

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Time delay (in milliseconds) follwing code change, after which the result is updated.
ast.target: 代码更改后更新结果的时间延迟（以毫秒为单位）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable code formatter to use semi-colons
ast.target: 启用代码格式化器使用分号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable code formatter to use single quotes instead of double quotes
ast.target: 启用代码格式化器使用单引号代替双引号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable code formatter to use trailing commas
ast.target: 启用代码格式化器使用尾随逗号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default markup language when using the "Quick playground" command
ast.target: 使用“快速 playground”命令时的默认标记语言

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default style language when using the "Quick playground" command
ast.target: 使用“快速 playground”命令时的默认样式语言

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default script language when using the "Quick playground" command
ast.target: 使用“快速 playground”命令时的默认脚本语言

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Markdown template for creating notes in your vault
ast.target: 用于在知识库中创建笔记的 Markdown 模板

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Markdown template for saving Github gists
ast.target: 用于保存 Github gists 的 Markdown 模板

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Select a playground or type to search
ast.target: 选择一个 playground 或输入搜索

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Select a starter or type to search
ast.target: 选择一个 starter 或输入搜索

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 复制 playground 的 markdown 链接

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 复制 playground 的 Obsidian URL

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 恢复默认 gist 模板

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [before-after-hook]: \"Hook()\" 重新用途警告，请使用 \"Hook.Collection()\"。阅读更多：https://git.io/upgrade-before-after-hook-to-1.4

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%cReading a derived belonging to a now-destroyed effect may result in stale values
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert
ast.target: %c[svelte] derived_inert\n%c读取一个属于已销毁效果的派生值可能导致过时的值\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是一个组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA \`<svelte:boundary>\` \`reset\` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c一个 \\`<svelte:boundary>\\` 的 \\`reset\\` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check whether the file's first docblock comment contains '@noprettier' or '@noformat' to determine if it should be formatted.
ast.target: 检查文件的第一个文档块注释是否包含 '@noprettier' 或 '@noformat' 以确定是否应进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print (to stderr) where a cursor at the given position would move to after formatting.
ast.target: （打印到标准错误）给定位置的光标在格式化后将移动到何处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which end of line characters to apply.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Line Feed only (\n), common on Linux and macOS as well as inside git repos
ast.target: 仅换行符 (\\n)，在 Linux 和 macOS 以及 git 仓库中常见

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return + Line Feed characters (\r\n), common on Windows
ast.target: 回车 + 换行符 (\\r\\n)，在 Windows 中常见

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return character only (\r), used very rarely

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Maintain existing
(mixed values within one file are normalised by looking at what's used after the first line)
ast.target: 保持现有\n（通过查看第一行之后使用的字符来规范化单个文件中的混合值）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specify the input filepath. This will be used to do parser inference.
ast.target: 指定输入文件路径。这将用于进行解析器推断。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Insert @format pragma into file's first docblock comment.
ast.target: 在文件的第一个文档块注释中插入 @format 编译指示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a plugin. Multiple plugins can be passed as separate `--plugin`s.
ast.target: 添加一个插件。可以通过多个 `--plugin` 参数传递多个插件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The line length where Prettier will try wrap.
ast.target: Prettier 尝试换行的行长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Format code ending at a given character offset (exclusive).
The range will extend forwards to the end of the selected statement.
ast.target: 格式化代码，结束于给定的字符偏移量（不包括）。\n该范围将向前延伸到所选语句的末尾。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Format code starting at a given character offset.
The range will extend backwards to the start of the first line containing the selected statement.
ast.target: 格式化代码，起始于给定的字符偏移量。\n该范围将向后延伸到包含所选语句的第一行的开头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Require either '@prettier' or '@format' to be present in the file's first docblock comment in order for it to be formatted.
ast.target: 要求文件的第一个文档块注释中必须存在 '@prettier' 或 '@format' 才能对其进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of spaces per indentation level.
ast.target: 每个缩进级别的空格数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent with tabs instead of spaces.
ast.target: 使用制表符而不是空格进行缩进。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Control how Prettier formats quoted code embedded in the file.
ast.target: 控制 Prettier 如何格式化文件中嵌入的带引号代码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Format embedded code if Prettier can automatically identify it.
ast.target: 如果 Prettier 能够自动识别嵌入的代码，则对其进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 永不自动格式化嵌入的代码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep as multi-line, if there is a newline between the opening brace and first property.
ast.target: 如果左花括号和第一个属性之间有换行符，则保持为多行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fit to a single line when possible.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use single quotes instead of double quotes.
ast.target: 使用单引号代替双引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap prose if it exceeds the print width.
ast.target: 如果散文超过打印宽度，则换行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Put > of opening tags on the last line instead of on a new line.
ast.target: 将开始标签的 `>` 放在最后一行，而不是新行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enforce single attribute per line in HTML, Vue and JSX.
ast.target: 在 HTML、Vue 和 JSX 中强制每行一个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to handle whitespaces in HTML.
ast.target: 如何处理 HTML 中的空白字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Respect the default value of CSS display property.
ast.target: 尊重 CSS display 属性的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 空白字符被视为不敏感。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent script and style tags in Vue files.
ast.target: 在 Vue 文件中缩进 script 和 style 标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a Github API token to enable creating gists from a playground. Create a token at https://github.com/settings/tokens/new (only gist permission required)
ast.target: 添加一个 Github API 令牌以启用从 playground 创建 gists。在 https://github.com/settings/tokens/new 创建令牌（仅需 gist 权限）

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Select a vault folder to save & persist playground configuration files (JSON).

Default: playgrounds
ast.target:
选择一个保险库文件夹以保存和持久化 playground 配置文件（JSON）。

默认：playgrounds

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Select a vault folder to save playground notes (Markdown).

Default: playgrounds/notes
ast.target:
选择一个保险库文件夹以保存 playground 笔记（Markdown）。

默认：playgrounds/notes

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Automatically watch for playground changes, then update the corresponding configuration file (JSON).

Default: enabled
ast.target:
自动监视 playground 的更改，然后更新相应的配置文件（JSON）。

默认：已启用

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set the editor theme for each editor and on light/dark modes.
ast.target: 为每个编辑器以及亮/暗模式设置编辑器主题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If this plugin adds value for you and you would like to help support continued development, please consider sponsoring the developers.
ast.target: 如果此插件对您有价值，并且您希望帮助支持持续开发，请考虑赞助开发者。

ast.source:
Copy playground results HTML to the clipboard.

(5 of 10)

(5 of 10)

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Sets the playground theme to light/dark mode.

(8 of 10)

将 playground 主题设置为亮/暗模式。
